title: Ubiquiti ACB-ISP, airCube ISP WiFi access point / router
description: AirCube ISP is home router with modern design and very powerful / discrete antenna system hidden under a plastic chassis. The body of the router is in black matt color is complemented by an elegant white backlit base The Router features 3x 10/100 Mbps LAN ports (1st LAN port supports PoE IN), 1x 10/100 Mbps WAN port with PoE output PoE, microUSB connector and 2x2 MIMO WiFi radio supporting 300Mbps speed in 2.4GHz Router can be powering via unpacked microUSB power adapter or via 24V passive injector connected to the 1st LAN port, which will also power an outdoor unit such as Loco, PowerBeam, NanoBeam and other CPE connected to the WAN port WEB UI - Enables a standalone utility for basic configuration UMobile app - Supports quick setup and status information UNMS - Provides advanced remote control of Ubiquiti ® devices Device
specsSearch: Wireless features Wireless frequency 2.4 GHz WiFi standards 802.11n, 802.11b/g Transmission speed - 2.4GHz [Mb/s] 300 Tx power 2.4GHz [dBm] 22 Security WPA2 AES 2.4GHz MIMO 2 x 2 Type of antenna Built-in Internal antennas 1 Antenna gain [dBi] 4 Connectors and Interfaces WAN speed (1) 10/100Mbps LAN speed (3) 10/100Mbps Power Power over Ethernet 24V DC PoE type PoE-Out + PoE-In Max. power consumption [W] 5 Power via connector/terminal 5V / 2A Physical characteristics Purpose Indoor Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 10 up to 50 Weight [g] 280 Width [mm] 90 Height [mm] 88 Depth [mm] 90
